ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-16-2021 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A.DATT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FLYWHEEL TAXI AS TO DEFENDANT LUSTIG, ALLISON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE CASE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS THIS CASE CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-12-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 506, 400 MCALLISTER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FLYWHEEL TAXI IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HAMIR HALTEH, ASST OPERATIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT ALLISON LUSTIG IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG REQUESTS THE APPEARANCE OF ALL PARTIES IN THIS MATTER. PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM (SUBMITTING A ZOOM REQUEST IS NOT REQUIRED). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FLYWHEEL TAXI REPRESENTED BY NAMEER HALTEH, OPERATIONAL MANAGER ASSISTANCE, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLISON LUSTIG IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE IS MADE. COURT RECUSES HERSELF FROM HEARING THIS MATTER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
